issuesFound.title: Image missing alt attribute
issuesFound.explanation: The `` element at line 137 in the hero image section has no alt attribute, which violates WCAG 1.1.1 (Content on Images). Screen readers cannot announce the image's purpose, and users relying on visual inspection lose context.
issuesFound.fix: Line 137: ``

issuesFound.title: Missing accessible name on link
issuesFound.explanation: The `<a>` element at line 137 linking to the hero image has no visible text or aria-label, which violates WCAG 2.4.4 (Link Purpose). The image alone cannot convey its purpose to screen readers.
issuesFound.fix: Line 137: `Start your free 14-day trial` (already has text, but the image inside the hero section is not linked directly)

issuesFound.title: Missing accessible name on button
issuesFound.explanation: The `<button>` at line 139 (nav-toggle) lacks an accessible name, which violates WCAG 2.4.4. The aria-label "Open navigation menu" is present but the button's visible text is empty.
issuesFound.fix: Line 139: `<button type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="nav-menu" aria-label="Open navigation menu" class="nav-toggle">Open menu</button>`

  Line 135: `<nav id="main-nav" aria-label="Primary navigation menu">`

issuesFound.title: Toggle button missing aria-expanded
issuesFound.explanation: The buttons at lines 139, 146, 150, and 153 (nav-toggle, Solutions dropdown, Resources dropdown, and billing toggle) are toggle buttons that control expandable content but lack the `aria-expanded` attribute, violating SC 4.1.2 (Focus visible state).
issuesFound.fix:
Add aria-expanded attributes:
  Line 139: `<button type="button" aria-expanded="false" aria-controls="nav-menu" aria-label="Open navigation menu" class="nav-toggle">Open menu</button>`
